source: user-captured 60s @ 903 MHz, 2.4 Msps, RTL-SDR – LongModerate (SF11/125kHz) preset
notes: Locks in the LDRO logic: SF11 + BW=125kHz has Tsym=16.4ms which crosses the 16ms LDRO threshold. With pre-v0.7.16 LDRO logic (sf==12 only), constructing a decoder for this preset and feeding it real samples triggers a SIGILL in the codec. Window is 3s wide because at SF11/125kHz a packet plus any false-positive-preamble timeouts need ~2s headroom to complete.
